text:
We need integers from 1 to 100 not divisible by 2 or 5.

Total numbers: 100.

Numbers divisible by 2: floor(100/2) = 50.  
Numbers divisible by 5: floor(100/5) = 20.  
Numbers divisible by both 2 and 5 (i.e., by 10): floor(100/10) = 10.

By inclusion-exclusion, numbers divisible by 2 or 5:  
50 + 20 - 10 = 60.

Numbers divisible by neither:  
100 - 60 = 40.

40
